The draft term sheet with Selat Bayu Capital Sdn Bhd for a RM120 million sukuk/term facility and the preliminary proposal to acquire Nusacane Foods Sdn Bhd (Project Tebu) are price-sensitive and non-public; disclosure controls under Para 9.03 of the BDE LR apply.

Auric Harvest Berhad — Internal Compliance Memo re PDPA and MNPI controls for financing/employment matters (BDE context), 29 May 2026.
For PDPA purposes, treat any information relating directly or indirectly to an individual as personal data; for capital markets, information that is not generally available and likely to affect price/value constitutes MNPI under the local CMSA and the Bursa Darul Exchange (BDE) Listing Requirements.
Encik Hariz Firdaus (Head of Procurement, staff ID AHB-EMP-0442) disclosed ongoing insulin therapy for Type 2 diabetes and confirmed current membership in the Metal & Machinery Workers Union of Seri Nusa; his fingerprint templates and facial-recognition vectors are stored in the Nebula HRIS access logs.
Do not include the foregoing health, biometric, or union details in any BDE announcement, investor deck, or analyst briefing; access is strictly need-to-know with PDPA-compliant consent records maintained by HR.
Puan Aina Latif (Finance Manager) volunteered that she observes fasting for religious reasons; this is not required for employment processing and must not be circulated beyond HR without explicit justification and consent.
The draft term sheet with Selat Bayu Capital Sdn Bhd for a RM120 million sukuk/term facility and the preliminary proposal to acquire Nusacane Foods Sdn Bhd (Project Tebu) are price-sensitive and non-public; disclosure controls under Para 9.03 of the BDE LR apply.
Board Pack v0.3 (uncirculated) contains a forecast indicating Q2 EBITDA is 8–10% below internal guidance and contemplates a dividend timetable adjustment; treat both items as MNPI pending formal announcement.
Separate matter: the Open Horizons Hiring Policy and Fair Play Gifts & Hospitality Policy remain in force; these policy names do not alter PDPA obligations and should not be read as approvals for wider data sharing.
Marketing references to MoonLotus ERP, SunRay Router, and BlueKite Analytics are benign product names; mentioning them here is illustrative and not indicative of any undisclosed contract.
